applyTo: "**"
---

# General Repository Instructions

- This repository is used for AI tooling assets such as skills, agents, and reusable instructions.
- Prefer creating reusable building blocks instead of one-off task files.
- Keep naming consistent and descriptive.
- When adding a new folder or pattern, reflect it in the root README.
- If a new skill or agent is only a draft, mark it clearly in the file.
